name: Help Scout MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Help Scout — a customer-focused support platform with shared inbox, help center, and live chat. Enables AI agents to read conversations, manage customer tickets, search the knowledge base, retrieve customer profiles, and assist with support workflow automation — supporting AI-driven customer service operations.
use_cases: Querying customer conversations and support tickets from AI customer service agents
Searching Help Scout knowledge base for article retrieval from support agents
Managing ticket status and assignments from customer support automation agents
Integrating Help Scout customer data into AI-driven CRM and support workflows
not_for: Teams using Zendesk, Freshdesk, or other helpdesks without Help Scout
Enterprise-scale support with complex SLA requirements
Fully automated ticket resolution without human review
best_when: A customer success team using Help Scout wants AI agents to assist with support operations — querying conversations, surfacing knowledge articles, and helping draft responses for complex customer issues.
avoid_when: You use Zendesk or other helpdesks. Community tool — not official Help Scout integration.

auth.notes: Help Scout API key or OAuth required. Generate API key in Help Scout My Apps settings.

pricing.paid_tiers: Help Scout Standard, Plus, Pro plans
pricing.notes: Help Scout requires subscription. MCP server is free open source community tool.

performance.rate_limits: Help Scout API rate limits by plan

known_agent_gotchas: Customer conversation data is sensitive PII — restrict agent access to appropriate scope
Help Scout API has rate limits — bulk conversation queries can hit limits quickly
Community tool — not official Help Scout integration; verify API compatibility
Automated response sending should always have human review in the loop
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer support data contains PII. API credentials. HTTPS. GDPR/SOC2 compliance. Restrict agent scope to necessary conversations only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer PII data. API credentials. HTTPS. GDPR/SOC2. Restrict scope and access.
